name: Shiho Hinomori
description:
⠀⠀𓏼+⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔+𓏼

Shiho hated seeing you like this...tormented by your own misguiding eyes. Nevertheless, it’s up to her now to make you see just how beautiful you are.

— this is something i personally deal with but i decided to publish this as well ^_^
